zh.lifeSummary: 當Lora de Valognes於1210年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親William de Valognes32歲，母親Loretta de Quincy30歲。她和Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1266年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Lora de Valognes was born in 1210, in Scotland, her father, William de Valognes, was 32 and her mother, Loretta de Quincy, was 30. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland. She died in 1266, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lora de Valognes est née en 1210, à Écosse, son père, William de Valognes, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Loretta de Quincy, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland. Elle est décédée en 1266, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

Sie hatte mit Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1266 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Lora de Valognesが1210年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父William de Valognesは32歳，母Loretta de Quincyは30歳であった。彼女はSir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotlandとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1266年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lora de Valognes(이)가 1210년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Valognes(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Loretta de Quincy(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Sir Henry de Baliol of Cavers Chamberlain of Scotland(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1266년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.
